prestart.reminder: Press Play (▶) for di Floating Window when you ready to start. Once di test don start, no press Pause (⏸) until you finish reading: Pause ends di test; e no pause di timer. Press Stop/Reset (⏹) only if you wan cancel di test.

entry.title: Reading speed test
entry.intro:
Dis test go help estimate your real reading speed through guided session. Di app go open di text and wait make you press Play (▶) for di Floating Window when you ready to start. Once di test don start, no press Pause (⏸) until you finish reading: Pause ends di test; e no pause di timer. Use Stop/Reset (⏹) only if you wan cancel di test. After, you fit check comprehension questions if di text get dem and, for di end, create preset from di result.
Before you start, remember say these test texts usually need between 5 and 15 minutes of steady concentration, without interruption.
Dis pool dey use short texts, so take di result with care. No use am directly judge long texts, where good factors like flow and context build-up, and bad factors like mental recap and tiredness, usually dey matter.
entry.pool_exhausted_message: No unused test files remain. Reset di pool or add more files.
entry.visible_empty_bundled_hidden_message: Built-in test files dey hidden now, and no visible unused test files remain. Show di built-in files again or import more files to continue.
entry.start_random_confirm: Dis go overwrite di current text with random eligible text from di pool. You wan continue?
entry.reset_confirm: Dis go reset di whole test pool and mark all files as unused again. You wan continue?
entry.import_summary: Import finished. Imported: {imported}. Skipped duplicates: {skippedDuplicates}. Failed validation: {failedValidation}. Failed archive entries: {failedArchiveEntries}. Failed writes: {failedWrites}.

questions.title: Reading comprehension questions
questions.intro: Answering these reading comprehension questions na optional and e no affect your final score. Dem only dey help you check di text difficulty and whether your reading pace and style let you reach basic comprehension. Your answers no dey saved or sent to di developers or anybody else.
questions.random_value: Expected score if person guess at random: {percentage}
questions.incomplete_warning: You must answer all questions before evaluation.
questions.chance_at_least_observed: Chance to get at least dis score by random guessing: {percentage}

alerts.text_extraction_batch_ocr_unavailable: Dis batch get OCR items, but Google OCR no dey available now. If OCR never enable yet, use Preferences > Enable Google OCR. Otherwise, check OCR setup/auth status and try again before you start di batch.
